flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Connecticut rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.5k → $21.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Connecticut fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Connecticut are 26% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($74.0k vs $58.6k).
